message:
feat(hook,strict_git): expand hook system with additional interception patterns and strict git pack hardening

- Major hook expansion (~239 lines) with additional command interception
  patterns, improved argument parsing, and more granular blocking logic
- Expand strict_git pack with additional dangerous command detection
  covering more edge cases and alias patterns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
